## What are you trying to publish?

Describe the series, episode, or pack shape.

## Current files

List the relevant paths, for example:

```text
contents/my-series/series.json
contents/my-series/ep01/episode.json
contents/my-series/ep01/pages/p01.jpg
```

## Question

What is unclear?

## Rights note

Please only share content that you have the right to publish or show publicly.
